Package com.saperion.ngc.iform.xml

Class HeaderType

java.lang.Object
com.saperion.ngc.iform.xml.HeaderType
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class HeaderType extends Object implements Serializable

Java class for HeaderType complex type.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class. 

 <complexType name="HeaderType">
   <complexContent>
     <restriction base="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}anyType">
       <sequence>
         <element name="defName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="cnt" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}unsignedShort"/>
         <element name="wx" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}unsignedShort"/>
         <element name="wy" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}unsignedShort"/>
         <element name="kind" type="{http://www.saperion.com/NGXMLSchema}headerKindType"/>
         <element name="singleAcl" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="aclList" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="cntGroups" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}unsignedInt"/>
         <element name="cNormal" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}unsignedInt"/>
         <element name="cFillFrom" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}unsignedInt"/>
         <element name="cFillTo" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}unsignedInt"/>
         <element name="hasToolbar" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean"/>
         <element name="frameposition" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}long"/>
         <element name="noLocalization" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean"/>
         <element name="targetClients" type="{http://www.saperion.com/NGXMLSchema}targetClientsTypes"/>
         <element name="cSet" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}unsignedInt"/>
         <element name="cTextSet" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}unsignedInt"/>
         <element name="cText" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}unsignedInt"/>
         <element name="layoutVersion" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}unsignedInt"/>
         <element name="paneLayout" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean"/>
         <element name="title" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="script" type="{http://www.saperion.com/NGXMLSchema}ScriptType" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </restriction>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>

    • getTargetClients

      public List<TargetClientsType> getTargetClients()
      Gets the value of the targetClients property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the JAXB object. This is why there is not a set method for the targetClients property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

          getTargetClients().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list TargetClientsType

    • getCSet
